meta.description: Coding interview questions organized by difficulty and topic

questions.title: Two Sum
questions.description: Given an array of integers and a target, return indices of two numbers that add up to the target.
follow_ups: Can you do it in one pass?
What if there are multiple valid pairs?

questions.title: Valid Parentheses
questions.description: Given a string containing just the characters '(', ')', '{', '}', '[' and ']', determine if the input string is valid.
follow_ups: What if we add wildcard character '*'?

questions.title: Merge Intervals
questions.description: Given an array of intervals, merge all overlapping intervals.
follow_ups: What if intervals are streaming in?
How would you handle this in a distributed setting?

questions.title: Binary Tree Right Side View
questions.description: Given a binary tree, return the values of the nodes you can see from the right side.
follow_ups: What about left side view?
Can you do it with DFS?

questions.title: Product of Array Except Self
questions.description: Given an integer array, return an array where each element is the product of all elements except itself, without using division.
follow_ups: Can you do it in O(1) extra space?
What if the array contains zeros?

questions.title: Clone Graph
questions.description: Given a reference to a node in a connected undirected graph, return a deep copy of the graph.
follow_ups: How do you handle cycles?
BFS vs DFS trade-offs?

questions.title: Lowest Common Ancestor of a Binary Tree
questions.description: Given a binary tree, find the lowest common ancestor of two given nodes.
follow_ups: What if it's a BST?
What if nodes might not exist?
What if you have parent pointers?

questions.title: Word Break
questions.description: Given a string and a dictionary of words, determine if the string can be segmented into space-separated sequence of dictionary words.
follow_ups: Return all possible segmentations
What if the dictionary is very large?

questions.title: Number of Islands
questions.description: Given a 2D grid of '1's (land) and '0's (water), count the number of islands.
follow_ups: What if islands can be added dynamically?
How would you solve this in a distributed system?

questions.title: Minimum Window Substring
questions.description: Given strings s and t, find the minimum window substring of s that contains all characters of t.
follow_ups: What if we need exactly the count of each character?
Optimize for very long strings

questions.title: Alien Dictionary
questions.description: Given a sorted dictionary of an alien language, find the order of characters.
follow_ups: What if there are contradictions?
What if multiple valid orderings exist?

questions.title: Design Add and Search Words Data Structure
questions.description: Design a data structure that supports adding words and searching with '.' wildcard.
follow_ups: How would you optimize for memory?
What about prefix matching?

questions.title: LRU Cache
questions.description: Design a data structure for Least Recently Used (LRU) cache with O(1) get and put.
follow_ups: How would you make it thread-safe?
What about LFU cache?
How does this work in a distributed setting?

questions.title: Serialize and Deserialize Binary Tree
questions.description: Design an algorithm to serialize and deserialize a binary tree.
follow_ups: What about N-ary tree?
How would you handle very large trees?
Compressed serialization?

questions.title: Median of Two Sorted Arrays
questions.description: Find the median of two sorted arrays in O(log(m+n)) time.
follow_ups: Generalize to kth element
What if arrays are of very different sizes?

questions.title: Random Pick with Weight
questions.description: Given an array of positive integers w, implement pickIndex() which randomly picks an index in proportion to its weight.
follow_ups: How would you test the randomness?
What if weights change frequently?

questions.title: K Closest Points to Origin
questions.description: Given an array of points, find the K closest points to the origin.
follow_ups: What if points are streaming?
Quickselect vs heap trade-offs?

questions.title: Subarray Sum Equals K
questions.description: Given an array of integers and an integer k, find the total number of continuous subarrays whose sum equals k.
follow_ups: What if we need the actual subarrays?
What about non-negative numbers only?

questions.title: Accounts Merge
questions.description: Given a list of accounts where each element is a list of strings (name + emails), merge accounts belonging to the same person.
follow_ups: How would you handle billions of accounts?
What data structure is most efficient?

questions.title: Task Scheduler
questions.description: Given tasks with cooldown period n, find the minimum time to finish all tasks.
follow_ups: Return the actual schedule
What if tasks have priorities?
